evidences.title: Bitcoin / TetherUS Trade Ideas - BTCUSDT - TradingView
evidences.content: needs to test resistance to see if it holds. Only if the last major resistance holds will Bitcoin move back to test the same support once more. Not $57,772 but the $60,000 - $62,500 price range. Now, a lower low is not set in stone or guaranteed. If resistance is confirmed, then Bitcoin goes back down to see what the market will say around 60K. It can happen that buyers show up with force even before 60K. For example, the recent drop, buyers were present above $62,000. If prices rise up with force, then you can say good bye to any long-term move below the last major low. Anything can happen, but the market tends to produce strong variations between cycles. The fact that 2022 produced a lower low, November vs June, doesn't mean that 2026 will be the same. Market conditions are different [...] the time I expect the price go much lower as I predicted in November. 👇 📌 But for now, the pullback is in play. Hence short term long speculation make sense to me. evidences.title: Binance Data - CryptoDataDownload
evidences.content: - Symbol - The symbol for which the timeseries data refers - Open - This is the opening price of the time period - High - This is the highest price of the time period - Low - This is the lowest price of the time period - Close - This is the closing price of the time period - Volume (Crypto) - This is the volume in the transacted Ccy. Ie. For BTC/USDT, this is in BTC amount - Volume Base Ccy - This is the volume in the base/converted ccy. Ie. For BTC/USDT, this is in USDT amount - Trade Count - This is the unique number of trades for the given time period [...] - Open - This is the opening price of the time period - High - This is the highest price of the time period - Low - This is the lowest price of the time period - Close - This is the closing price of the time period - Volume (Crypto) - This is the volume in the transacted Ccy. Ie. For BTC/USDT, this is in BTC amount - Volume Base Ccy - This is the volume in the base/converted ccy. Ie. For BTC/USDT, this is in USDT amount - Trade Count - This is the unique number of trades for the given time period You can read more about the differences on Binance's website. evidences.title: How to Change Timezone on Binance - YouTube
evidences.content: Tap on that to open the settings menu. Change and chart time zone. Tap on it. A list of available time zones will appear. These are sorted by region and UTC offset. Scroll through the list and find the time zone that matches your local time or whichever time zone you prefer for tracking your trades and charts. Once you tap on your desired time zone, it will be instantly applied. No need to manually save or restart the app. From now on, all time stamps across the app, including your trade history and charts, will be displayed according to your selected time zone. And that's all there is to it. If this video helped you, make sure to give it a thumbs up and consider subscribing to our channel for more tutorials just like this one. Thanks for watching. evidences.title: #btcdominance Community Insights & Market Sentiment
evidences.content: CyberFlow Trading · Mar 13 Follow Report Block User BITCOIN REALIZED PRICE SIGNALING MAJOR BOTTOM FORMATION $BTC 🚨 Bloomberg highlights Bitcoin's Realized Price, the average cost basis of all circulating BTC. Historically, nearing or touching this metric has marked bear market bottoms in 2011, 2015, 2018, and 2022. While exact bottom calls are elusive, approaching this valuation zone presents a historically attractive risk/reward for accumulation. Expect prolonged sideways action around Realized Price before a new bull cycle ignites. Accumulate aggressively as liquidity pools form. Whales are positioning for the next wave. Do not miss this accumulation window. Not financial advice. Manage your risk. #Bitcoin #Crypto #BTCDominance #WhaleAlert 🚀 {future}(BTCUSDT) [...] 511,495 views 4,335 Discussing4 #US5DayHalt 1.5M views 11,938 Discussing5 1.4M views 10,815 Discussing1.3M views 11,342 Discussing7 1.1M views 8,464 Discussing912,177 views 6,375 Discussing2.9M views 19,582 Discussing10 1.9M views 13,535 Discussing [...] View More BTC+0.04%ETH-0.52% William - Square VN: The market is clearly reacting to the tighter Fed outlook, with Bitcoin dominance confirming a flight to safety du...
